hooks.command: echo '[geo-seo] Bash: Use parallel execution for independent tasks.'

if command -v biome >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -n "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" ] && echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then cd /Users/recepsen/Documents/projects/recep/geo-seo && bunx biome check "$CLAUDE_TOOL_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null | head -20 || true; fi

grep -rn 'password\|secret\|api_key\|GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY\|ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\|R2_SECRET' --include='*.ts' --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.git /Users/recepsen/Documents/projects/recep/geo-seo/packages/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'env\.' | grep -v 'process\.env' | grep -v '\.example' && echo '⚠️  Possible hardcoded secret detected!' || true
